channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Clean sweep: three Mamdani-endorsed candidates win New York primaries
item.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani demonstrated political influence as his three endorsed congressional candidates advanced to November's general election.

item.title: Alibaba files lawsuit against Pentagon over blacklist status
item.description: Chinese tech giant Alibaba has sued the Defense Department for labeling it a military-linked company.

item.title: Great white shark stalks paddleboarders off California coast
item.description: Drone footage shows a great white shark following two paddleboarders near Santa Barbara, California.

item.title: Trump-linked firm expands into pardon lobbying, first client pays $500K
item.description: Mo Strategies, founded by former Trump campaign and administration officials, has entered the pardon lobbying field.
